metaDescription: Boodney cover band — live concert in Munich. The hits you know and love. Order tickets online.
repertoireIntro: Every show is a surprise for the audience. You'll hear the hits you know and love:
setlistLink: What did we play last time?
paypalLine: Or send via PayPal (for «Friends & Family») to
paypalNote: In the payment note, please include your email - your ticket will arrive there within one day.

disclaimer.line1: Ticket payments are not a commercial sale and serve only to cover the costs of organizing the evening.
disclaimer.line2: Band «Boodney» is not a commercial organization.
disclaimer.line3: This site uses no tracking or analytics. Personal data is processed only when you submit a request through the "Order tickets" form, as described in our Privacy Policy.

setlistIntro: Here's what we played last time.

modalNotice.before: The data you provide is used only to process and send your ticket. Learn more in our

order.success: Thanks! Your request has been received. A PayPal invoice will arrive at your email shortly.
order.errTooMany: Too many requests. Please try again in a minute.
order.errServer: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us.
